title: Network O11y — Traffic Sankey
description: Sankey flow diagrams of SR Linux Clos fabric traffic. Uses label_replace() to map gNMI interface names to connected device names.

targets.expr: sum by (device_name, destination) (  label_replace(    label_replace(      label_replace(        label_replace(          rate(kentik_snmp_ifHCOutOctets{device_name=~".+", if_Description=~"ethernet-1/[123]"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8,          "device_name", "$1", "job", "integrations/snmp/(.*)"        ),        "destination", "leaf1", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/1"      ),      "destination", "leaf2", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/2"    ),    "destination", "leaf3", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/3"  ))

sum by (device_name, destination) (  label_replace(    label_replace(      label_replace(        rate(kentik_snmp_ifHCOutOctets{device_name=~".+", if_Description=~"ethernet-1/(49|50)"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8,        "device_name", "$1", "job", "integrations/snmp/(.*)"      ),      "destination", "spine1", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/49"    ),    "destination", "spine2", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/50"  ))

(sum by (device_name, destination) (  label_replace(    label_replace(      label_replace(        label_replace(          rate(kentik_snmp_ifHCOutOctets{device_name=~".+", if_Description=~"ethernet-1/[123]"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8,          "device_name", "$1", "job", "integrations/snmp/(.*)"        ),        "destination", "leaf1", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/1"      ),      "destination", "leaf2", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/2"    ),    "destination", "leaf3", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/3"  ))) + on(device_name, destination) (sum by (device_name, destination) (  label_replace(    label_replace(      label_replace(        label_replace(          rate(kentik_snmp_ifHCOutOctets{device_name=~".+", if_Description=~"ethernet-1/(49|50)"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8,          "device_name", "$1", "job", "integrations/snmp/(.*)"        ),        "destination", "$1", "device_name", "(leaf.*)"      ),      "device_name", "spine1", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/49"    ),    "device_name", "spine2", "if_Description", "ethernet-1/50"  )))
